channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DENORA] De Nora India Board to meet May 4 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
De Nora India Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 3:30 P.M. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend, if any, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company also informed that the trading window, which closed on April 1, 2026, will re-open 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Audited Financial Results for FY26.
  • Board to recommend dividend for FY26, if any.
  • Trading window re-opens 48 hours after results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DE NORA INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SNIM] Svarnim Trade: Sangeeta Aggarwal Resigns as Director
item.description:
Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Sangeeta Aggarwal from her position as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director, effective April 22, 2026. The company also appointed Mr. Gulshan Kumar Aggarwal as an Additional Non-Executive and Non-Independent Director from the same date. These changes led to the reconstitution of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and the Stakeholder Relationship Committee.

  • Sangeeta Aggarwal resigned as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director effective April 22, 2026.
  • Gulshan Kumar Aggarwal appointed as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director effective April 22, 2026.
  • Nomination and Remuneration Committee reconstituted effective April 22, 2026.
  • Stakeholder Relationship Committee reconstituted effective April 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [HINDTIN] Hindustan Tin Works: Faces ₹3.73 Cr GST Order
item.description:
Hindustan Tin Works Ltd. has received an order from Commissioner (Appeals-I), CGST, Delhi, upholding an original order dated 3rd Feb 2025, which includes GST of ₹3,73,60,481 along with applicable interest and penalty. The order pertains to the period from July 2017 to March 2021. The company plans to appeal the order with the GST Appellate Tribunal and anticipates a favorable outcome. The company does not foresee any material impact on its operations or other activities.

  • Hindustan Tin Works received an appeal order from CGST, Delhi.
  • The order upholds GST demand of ₹3.73 Cr plus interest and penalty.
  • The company will file an appeal with the GST Appellate Tribunal.
  • The company expects a favorable outcome at the appellate level.
  • No material impact is expected on the company's operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN TIN WORKS LTD.-$ | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [INDSWFTLAB] Ind-Swift Labs: HCP Investments Disposes 7.5% Stake
item.description:
HCP Investments disposed of 6,503,423 equity shares of Ind-Swift Laboratories Limited, representing 7.5% of the total paid-up share capital, between April 13 and April 16, 2026. Before the disposal, HCP Investments held 7,500,000 shares (8.649%). After the sale, the holding decreased to 996,577 shares (1.149%). The disposals were made through open market transactions.

  • HCP Investments sold 6,503,423 shares of Ind-Swift Labs, representing 7.5% stake.
  • The transactions occurred between April 13 and April 16, 2026, via open market.
  • HCP Investments' holding in Ind-Swift Labs decreased from 8.649% to 1.149% post-sale.
  • The equity share capital of Ind-Swift Labs before the sale was 86,711,558.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND-SWIFT LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [AMAL] Amal Ltd FY26 Results, ₹1.50 Dividend, MD & ID Reappointed
item.description:
Amal Ltd announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, with unmodified auditor reports. The Board recommended a final dividend of 15% (₹1.50 per share) for FY26, pending shareholder approval at the AGM on August 14, 2026. Book closure for dividend eligibility is from August 1 to August 7, 2026, with payment on or after August 19, 2026. The company also reappointed Mr. Rajeev Kumar as Managing Director and Mr. Jyotin Mehta as Independent Director for five-year terms, effective March 24, 2027, and April 22, 2027, respectively, subject to member approval.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of 15% (₹1.50 per share) for FY26.
  • Mr. Rajeev Kumar reappointed as Managing Director for five years from March 24, 2027.
  • Mr. Jyotin Mehta reappointed as Independent Director for five years from April 22, 2027.
  • Auditor's reports on financial results were unmodified.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMAL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SBILIFE] SBI Life: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd. announced the approval of its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during a Board of Directors meeting held on April 22, 2026. The audit reports, issued by joint statutory auditors M/s. K S Aiyar & Co. and M/s. J Singh & Associates, contain unmodified opinions. The trading window for company securities will reopen on April 25, 2026. The financial results are available on the company's website.

  • SBI Life approves audited financial results for FY26.
  • Auditors issue unmodified opinions on the financial results.
  • Trading window reopens on April 25, 2026.
  • First Year Premiums stand at ₹5,09,271.
  • Renewal Premium is ₹16,71,396.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HITECHGEAR] Hi-Tech Gears: NCLAT Adjourns CIRP Hearing to July 10, Interim Stay Continues
item.description:
The Hi-Tech Gears Ltd announced an update on its Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP). The Hon'ble NCLAT could not hear the appeal on April 20, 2026, due to paucity of time. The next hearing date has been fixed for July 10, 2026. Crucially, the NCLAT directed the continuation of the interim stay on the CIRP process, which was initially granted on September 03, 2024. This update relates to an appeal filed by Naveen Jain against Happy Forgings Ltd. & Anr.

  • NCLAT hearing for CIRP appeal adjourned from April 20, 2026.
  • Next hearing date for the appeal is now scheduled for July 10, 2026.
  • Interim stay on the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process continues.
  • The stay was originally granted by NCLAT on September 03, 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: The Hi-Tech Gears Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [ATISHAY] Atishay Ltd Secures ₹1.90 Cr Aadhaar Services Order
item.description:
Atishay Ltd has secured a work order worth ₹1.90 Crores (inclusive of taxes) from the office of CHiPS, Chhattisgarh, for the 'Development, Implementation, Operation & Maintenance of Aadhaar and its Allied Services' project. The project is to be executed over 3 years and 3 months. This order strengthens Atishay's order book and reinforces its position as a trusted partner for government-led digital transformation projects.

  • Atishay Ltd secures ₹1.90 Cr work order from CHiPS, Chhattisgarh for Aadhaar services.
  • The project execution timeline is 3 years and 3 months.
  • This order enhances revenue visibility and strengthens the company's order book.
  • The project aligns with Atishay's principal business activities and was awarded in the ordinary course of business.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Atishay Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BNL] Agribio Spirits updates corporate office address to Jaipur
item.description:
Agribio Spirits Ltd has announced a change in its corporate office address. The new address is 302-305, Signature Elite, J7 Govind Marg, Narayan Singh Circle, Jaipur - 302004. This update is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Additionally, the company confirmed that its books of accounts will now be maintained and kept at this new corporate office address.

  • Agribio Spirits changed its corporate office address.
  • New office located at Jaipur, Rajasthan.
  • Books of accounts will be maintained at the new address.
  • Update is per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Beekay Niryat Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JSWCEMENT] JSW Cement: Sutapa Banerjee ceases as Independent Director
item.description:
JSW Cement Ltd announced that Ms. Sutapa Banerjee ceased to be an Independent Director of the company, effective from the close of business hours on April 21, 2026. Her cessation is due to the completion of her second consecutive term as an Independent Director. Consequently, she also ceased to be a member of the Board Committees where she served. The company expressed its appreciation for her valuable contributions during her tenure. JSW Cement confirmed that the composition of its Board of Directors remains compliant with the requirements of the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Ms. Sutapa Banerjee ceased as JSW Cement's Independent Director.
  • Cessation effective April 21, 2026, after completing her second term.
  • She also stepped down from all Board Committees.
  • Company's board composition remains compliant with regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JSW Cement Ltd | Category: Management Change
